targets.query:
from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "packets")
  |> group(columns: ["protocol"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 10.0}))

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["protocol"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 10.0}))

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "packets")
  |> group()
  |> count()

panels.title: Top Traffic Consumers by Bytes (last 5 min)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["src_ip"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 15)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bytes_sent", src_ip: "source_ip"})

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["dst_ip"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bytes_recv", dst_ip: "dest_ip"})

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "tcp_flags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.ip_proto == "tcp" and r._value == 2)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Port Scan Detection — TCP Flows per Source (last 1 min)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "packets")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.ip_proto == "tcp" and r.direction == "internal")
  |> group(columns: ["src_ip"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "tcp_flows"})

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -10s)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _value: float(v: r._value) / 10.0 / 1250000.0 * 100.0}))

panels.title: Traffic by Collector Protocol (NetFlow / IPFIX / sFlow)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["protocol"])
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "flows")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> group(columns: ["direction"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
